# INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.ready

**Case**

The intents handler is ready to handle the intent.

## Declaration

```swift
case ready
```

## Discussion

Respond with this code in your Intents app extension’s [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INPlayMediaIntentHandling/confirm(intent:completion:)] method after verifying that your app can play the requested media.

## Intents App Extensions

- **INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.continueInApp**: The system should launch the app in the foreground to play the media.
- **INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.handleInApp**: The system should launch the app in the background to play the media.
